title: Tufelizamigos Textured Mace Enchants (Density & Breach)
description: Changes the colour of the textures of the mace depending on the enchantment
body:
This pack adds simple recolors to the mace based on its enchantment.

Each variant has its own color, making it easy to tell them apart at a glance while keeping a clean, vanilla-style look.

All the textures were made by Me_1_
